controls.name: atomic_move_mount_point_preflight
controls.requirement: Temp file must be created in destination directory and same st_dev plus same df -P mount point must pass before os.replace.

controls.name: differential_trace_logging
controls.requirement: Trace logs must emit counts/root hash/bounded samples, not full per-file hash lists, unless explicit full manifest artifact is requested.

controls.name: partial_root_safety_lock
controls.requirement: Copied runtime root is untrusted unless .MB_FINALIZATION_SUCCESS.json exists; partial/in-progress markers fail closed.
